commit_scope: Express the ideas router as high-level Form and lift its structure and source-index readings into the kernel-router native manifest.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.summary: docs/coherence-substrate/ideas-router.form expresses api/app/routers/ideas.py as a route recipe and deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk now binds /api/ideas/router-structure and /api/ideas/source-index to native Form handlers. The Rust kernel-router served both routes with HTTP 200, Content-Type application/json, and X-Form-Router: native-kernel. /api/ideas/source-index read ideas/INDEX.md and returned super_idea_count=17 and index_bytes=3512. Mutable DB-backed portfolio data routes remain FastAPI fan-out until graph-node storage is exposed through a Form carrier.

known_limitations.observed: The manifest evaluates to a route table containing closures; Go/Rust/TypeScript print closure identities differently, so the textual sibling comparison diverges even after the manifest boots and serves through the Rust carrier.
known_limitations.replacement_proof: Rust kernel-router smoke for /api/ideas/router-structure and /api/ideas/source-index returned HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router: native-kernel.

known_limitations.observed: Docker daemon is not running at unix:///Users/ursmuff/.docker/run/docker.sock in this local session, so the kernel-router image build was not run locally.
known_limitations.replacement_proof: Dockerfile change is scoped to COPY directives; route behavior is proven by the local Rust kernel-router binary using the same production manifest.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the native route follow-up commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted in this local route-manifest slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The kernel-router can serve GET /api/ideas/router-structure and GET /api/ideas/source-index natively from Form. The source-index route reads repo idea source and returns super_idea_count=17 while existing mutable DB-backed ideas data routes continue to fan out to FastAPI.
test_flows: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py

phase_gate.reason: Local runtime proof is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
